quotes.text: The code you wrote 6 months ago might as well have been written by someone else. And that someone was an idiot.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The single worst strategic mistake that any software company can make: rewrite the code from scratch.
quotes.author: Joel Spolsky
quotes.source: Things You Should Never Do, Part I, 2000

quotes.text: Legacy code is simply code without tests.
quotes.author: Michael Feathers

quotes.text: Any code of your own that you haven't looked at for six or more months might as well have been written by someone else.
quotes.author: Eagleson
